attr.title: Ninja Senki DX
attr.desc: On its 5th anniversary, Ninja Senki leaps from the shadows onto Steam to become Ninja Senki DX! When Princess Kinuhime is slain by a demon, Hayate becomes obsessed with revenge! Casting aside the art of invisibility, the blue ninja unleashes the power of shurikenjutsu upon mythological creatures, demons and other adversaries in his action-filled quest for vengeance!
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Steam and copy the NinjaSenkiDX.exe into assets folder.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/405540/Ninja_Senki_DX/) and copy the `NinjaSenkiDX.exe` into `assets` folder.
